name: plastron-simple-pictograph-example
description: Pictograph example ported to plastron-simple: read a dehydrated 甲骨, hydrate it, runCycle, demonstrate a runtime function-cel swap, dehydrate to 甲骨.json.

scripts.check: bun build index.html --target=browser --outdir /tmp/picto-check --external pyodide --external quickjs-emscripten --external wabt --external node:fs/promises --external node:path
